query: What is the single most in-demand, viral-potential software chess tool or feature that millions of chess players desperately want but don't yet have?
assumptions: Chess.com user growth trends continue at current trajectory
LLM capabilities continue improving at current rate
Stockfish WASM remains free and open-source
No major regulatory changes to AI coaching tools
Duolingo Chess+ launched to at least 10M users within 12 months
